function.message: I could not complete the inbox request because one of the explicitly listed source files is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_02_01__eur_000036__bill__family_map_wall_board.md`. I verified this with both a direct read attempt and a follow-up find search in `50_finance/purchases`. To avoid partial work on a 5-item OCR request, I stopped without mutating finance files or deleting the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied root and nested AGENTS rules, read relevant workflows/schemas before task work, and followed inbox completeness/no-partial-processing guidance. No write/delete mutations were made.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task in `00_inbox/724_next-task.md` requires OCR of five specific files. One required path (`50_finance/purchases/_2026_02_01__eur_000036__bill__family_map_wall_board.md`) is absent (direct read: file not found; find: no matches), so the request cannot be completed exactly as specified without guessing or partial completion.
